name: Calc Sheets
description: Line-oriented calculation worksheets with units, formulas, and live result gutters
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.tagline: Reusable business-model worksheets with live results
marketplace.longDescription: Open .calc.md files in a dedicated editor built for line-oriented assumptions, formulas, units, assertions, and quick business modeling. Calc Sheets stay text-first, embed inside markdown documents, and show live results in a calculator-style gutter.
highlights: Line-based worksheets instead of grid-heavy spreadsheets
Live result gutter with unit-aware evaluation
Custom editor embeds directly inside markdown documents
YAML frontmatter for currency, units, and display defaults

newFileMenu.defaultContent:
---
title: New Calc Sheet
baseCurrency: USD
display:
  decimals: 2
units: []
---

# Inputs
price = 100 USD
quantity = 1

# Results
total = price * quantity -> currency(USD, 2)
